pattern_en: Bath unit body quoted at list price or less than 20% off
pattern_ja: UB本体が定価のまま or 定価20%OFF未満で計上
reason_en: TOTO/LIXIL trade purchase price is 60% off list. Anywhere near list is overpricing.

pattern_en: Demolition, carpentry, plumbing all lumped as single items
pattern_ja: 解体・大工工事・配管が全て『一式』計上
reason_en: Bathroom is the highest-step-count category. Lumping is always overpricing pattern.

pattern_ja: 在来→UB工事で¥1,000,000未満の見積もり
reason_en: HS standard 1.94M JPY. Under 1M signals add-on extortion later.
HS standard 1.94M JPY. Over 3M without window work exceeds 1.5x markup.

pattern_en: Premium UB + conventional renovation over 5M JPY
20+ year conventional demolition without sill/foundation assessment
pattern_ja: 築20年以上の在来解体なのに土台状態確認・補修予算記載なし
reason_en: Old conventional bathrooms have 50% sill rot rate and 30% termite rate. Absence indicates surprise-billing pattern.

pattern_en: UB manufacturer / series / size / model not specified
pattern_ja: UBメーカー・シリーズ・サイズ・型番不明
reason_en: TOTO Sazana N vs Shinra differ by over 1M JPY. Ambiguity is fraud territory.

pattern_en: Forcing premium grade (Spagia/Shinra) when standard would suffice
pattern_ja: 標準で十分なのに最上位グレード強要
reason_en: Standard grade (Arise/Sazana N) sufficient for typical detached homes. Pushes 800K-1.5M JPY excess.

pattern_en: Window work lumped without specifying method (cover vs demolition)
pattern_ja: 窓工事が『一式』、工法（カバー/はつり）の明示なし
reason_en: Cover method 150K vs demolition 400K JPY differ significantly.

pattern_en: Window resizing without exterior wall recovery
pattern_ja: 窓サイズ変更工事なのに外壁復旧工事の記載なし
reason_en: Without exterior recovery, leak risks emerge. Often used as add-on extortion.

pattern_ja: 在来→UBで工期3日以下を提示
reason_en: Conventional-to-UB requires minimum 5 days. Suggests cutting corners.

pattern_en: Unlicensed worker handling gas reheat piping
pattern_ja: 追焚配管工事を無資格者が担当
reason_en: Gas Equipment Installation Supervisor license is legally required.

pattern_ja: 電気工事を無資格者が兼務
reason_en: Class-2 Electrician license is legally required.

pattern_en: Post-Apr-13 2026 contract specifies TOTO/LIXIL without delivery date confirmation
pattern_ja: 2026/4/13以降の新規契約でTOTO/LIXIL指定も納期確認なし
reason_en: Both manufacturers stopped new orders. Risk of indefinite construction delay. Demand confirmed delivery before signing.

pattern_en: No assessment of mansion (apartment) common-area piping impact
pattern_ja: マンション共用部（配管・排水管）への影響チェックなし
reason_en: Mansion bathroom regulations restrict piping changes. Building management approval required.
